demos.human_message: Aluminum supply dropped by 10%, expected delay of 3 days.

signature.instructions: Infer user intent from unstructured text and convert to a structured JSON payload for material_engine. Only include fields that can be confidently inferred. business_id must always be included. Do not invent values. Valid type values: WIP, Order, Planning, Material.

fields.description: Single structured JSON object with inferred fields for material_engine. Must include business_id. type must be one of: WIP, Order, Planning, Material. Omit any field that cannot be inferred.

signature.instructions: Build the route payload for Order Agent from material_engine result. Set route to 'Order Agent'. In payload: change type to 'Order', add original_type='Material'. Output must be a single JSON object with exactly two keys: 'route' and 'payload'.

fields.description: Single JSON object: {"route": "Order Agent", "payload": {...}} where payload is the tool_result with type changed to 'Order' and original_type set to 'Material'.

signature.instructions: Build the route payload for Planning Agent from material_engine result. Only invoked when the Order Agent decision is POSITIVE. Set route to 'Planning Agent'. In payload: change type to 'Planning', add original_type='Material'. Output must be a single JSON object with exactly two keys: 'route' and 'payload'.

fields.description: Decision from Order Agent — must be POSITIVE to reach this step
Single JSON object: {"route": "Planning Agent", "payload": {...}} where payload is the tool_result with type changed to 'Planning' and original_type set to 'Material'.
